description: Technical debt tracking for ResumeAI codebase

code_quality.name: Code Quality
code_quality.description: Issues related to code structure, readability, and maintainability

architecture.name: Architecture
architecture.description: Structural improvements needed in the codebase

dependencies.name: Dependencies
dependencies.description: Outdated packages, security vulnerabilities, or dependency issues

testing.name: Testing
testing.description: Test coverage gaps, testing infrastructure improvements

high.name: High
high.description: Should be addressed in current sprint

medium.name: Medium
medium.description: Should be addressed in next few sprints

low.name: Low
low.description: Can be addressed when time permits
